name: Greek Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground beef, garlic, lemon juice, oregano leaves, cumin, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Add the plum tomato and parsley to the mixture and combine well.
3. Form the mixture into 4 patties about 3/4-inch thick.
4. Grill or broil the burgers, 4-inches from the heat source, for 3 minutes on each side for medium-rare.
5. Cut a pocket in each of the four pita breads and turn one piece upside down to reinforce the bottom.
6. Place a grilled burger in each pocket bread along with a romaine lettuce leaf and paper-thin slices of red onion.
7. Spoon cilantro chutney into the burgers (optional).
